arbitrary_explanation_question.expected: mode=question; explanatory open-domain answer; provenance=model_knowledge; no fake local sources
arbitrary_explanation_question.label: Arbitrary explanation question

arbitrary_factual_question.expected: mode=question; answer-kind=open_domain_model; provenance=model_knowledge; no fake local sources
arbitrary_factual_question.label: Arbitrary factual question
arbitrary_factual_question.prompt: who is the president of France?

blocked_state_question.expected: awaiting_confirmation first; then grounded read-only explanation of the current confirmation boundary
blocked_state_question.label: Blocked-state question
blocked_state_question.prompt: close Telegram -> what exactly do you need me to confirm?

casual_chat_question.expected: mode=question; bounded casual reply; no execution; no fake local sources
casual_chat_question.label: Casual chat question

grounded_docs_question.expected: grounded local answer with sources/support-attributions; no execution
grounded_docs_question.label: Grounded docs question

mixed_question_command.expected: routing clarification only; no silent answer+execute behavior
mixed_question_command.label: Mixed question + command
mixed_question_command.prompt: what can you do and open Safari

provider_unavailable_path.env_hint: JARVIS_QA_BACKEND=llm JARVIS_QA_LLM_ENABLED=true JARVIS_QA_LLM_OPEN_DOMAIN_ENABLED=true with the configured API key env unset or invalid
provider_unavailable_path.expected: honest unavailable/failure answer path; no fake answer; no hidden execution fallback
provider_unavailable_path.label: Provider unavailable path
provider_unavailable_path.prompt: who is the president of France? (with provider intentionally unavailable)
